title: Extend chokidar watcher to rules/ — cache invalidate ONLY
description: Per D25: watcher downgraded to cache invalidation only (no auto-sync, no ledger writes from watcher). http.ts:167-177 chokidar glob extends from current ['agents.meta.json', 'bootstrap/README.md'] to additionally include '.fabric/rules/**/*.md'. On change → contextCache.invalidate('file_watch') → next MCP call triggers ensureRulesFresh which does the actual sync. This avoids race between watcher writes and serve/doctor concurrent writes.
scope: Layer 2 P0 — R28 watcher path; subsumes R23

files.change: Lines 167-177: extend chokidar glob to include '.fabric/rules/**/*.md'. On change event call contextCache.invalidate('file_watch', projectRoot) ONLY — no ledger writes, no sync calls
NEW: edit a rule .md file while server running; assert cache invalidated; assert no immediate ledger write from watcher; next MCP call triggers sync

criteria: Watcher only calls cache.invalidate; no ledger writes from watcher
Next MCP tool call after edit triggers ensureRulesFresh
No race conditions with concurrent doctor --fix (cache invalidate is idempotent)
